title: galium javanicum var. javanicum
intro: Galium javanicum var. javanicum, also known as Galium javanicum, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, offering benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Galium javanicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has been used to help alleviate symptoms of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as to promote wound healing and immune system function.
